info.description: This API is to be used to emit an Alert event to the Alert engine by any alert services consumting consuming application
info.title: Alerts

productTranReferenceNumber.description: Uniquely identification number for the transaction within Product / Alert Event.

cifGUID.description: If the said alert event is expected to raise any notification to customer, this is mandatory

attributes.description: The attributes passed need to be in line with fields that are pre-configured for the charge event

customerAdviceTemplate.description: Debit advice (in case of Payments) or credit advice (in case of Collections) template if available; This template is expected to be retrieved from CIM by the PP (using appropriate granularity) and passed here

counterPartyAdviceTemplate.description: Beneficiary advice template as configured in CIM. Expectected to retrieved from CIM by the PP

bankMakerId.description: User ID of Bank maker if available with the transaction

counterPartyMobileNumber.description: If a notification is expected to be sent (also) to a counterparty (e.g. beneficiary in payments or sub-customer in collections)

counterPartyEmailId.description: If a notification is expected to be sent (also) to a counterparty (e.g. beneficiary in payments or sub-customer in collections)

preResolvedAlertMesssageTemplateCode.description: Where Alert engine is used only for message generation and delivery, then this is to be provided. Message template includes message generation configuration for Email, SMS

preResolvedDestinationEmailIds.description: To be provided when the Alert engine is used only for message generation and delivery

preResolvedDestinationMobileNos.description: To be provided when the Alert engine is used only for message generation and delivery
